ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season during which the game took place */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "final_score_home" INTEGER /* Final score of the home team */,
  "final_score_away" INTEGER /* Final score of the away team */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoffs, championship) */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Current status of the game (e.g., Scheduled, In Progress, Completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Arena where the team plays its home games */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the division the team belongs to */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conference the team belongs to */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., Guard, Forward, Center) */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (e.g., Active, Injured, Suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plays" (
  "play_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game in which the play occurred */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter of the game during which the play occurred */,
  "time_remaining" TEXT /* Time remaining in the quarter when the play occurred */,
  "play_type" TEXT /* Type of play (e.g., Shot, Rebound, Turnover) */,
  "player_involved_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the play */,
  "play_result" TEXT /* Result of the play (e.g., Made, Missed, Turnover) */,
  "utah_action" TEXT /* Action taken by the Utah team */,
  "orlando_action" TEXT /* Action taken by the Orlando team */,
  "utah_score" INTEGER /* Utah team's score after the play */,
  "orlando_score" INTEGER /* Orlando team's score after the play */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("play_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score log */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game associated with the score log */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter during which the score was recorded */,
  "score_type" TEXT /* Type of score (e.g., Points, Rebounds, Assists) */,
  "score_value" INTEGER /* Value of the score */,
  "utah_score" INTEGER /* Total score of the Utah team after the quarter */,
  "orlando_score" INTEGER /* Total score of the Orlando team after the quarter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team stat record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game for the statistics */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "stat_type" TEXT /* Type of statistic (e.g., Points, Rebounds, Assists) */,
  "stat_value" INTEGER /* Value of the statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "player_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player stat record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game for the statistics */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "stat_type" TEXT /* Type of statistic (e.g., Points, Rebounds, Assists) */,
  "stat_value" INTEGER /* Value of the statistic */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the referee */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of officiating experience */,
  "referee_type" TEXT /* Type of referee (e.g., Lead Referee, Umpire, Linesman) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_referees" (
  "game_referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game-referee association */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being officiated */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee officiating the game */,
  "referee_role" TEXT /* Role of the referee in the game (e.g., Lead Referee, Umpire, Linesman) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "season_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fan_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game associated with the engagement metrics */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement metric (e.g., Attendance, Social Media Mentions, Merchandise Sales) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the game */,
  "social_media_mentions" INTEGER /* Number of social media mentions during the game */,
  "merchandise_sales" REAL /* Total merchandise sales during the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season stat record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "stat_type" TEXT /* Type of statistic (e.g., Points, Rebounds, Assists) */,
  "stat_value" INTEGER /* Value of the statistic */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total games played by the team in the season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total wins by the team in the season */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Total losses by the team in the season */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team in the season */,
  "points_allowed" INTEGER /* Total points allowed by the team in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for account login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, scout) */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., Active, Inactive, Suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "conference_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)
